Liu Miao ŚäČťāą
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Miao (ŚäČťāą). Sent to the capital to present tribute, and praised Cao Cao as being loyal. Liu Miao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
